description: Composition Orange T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves, graphic print on the chest and brand badge above the left hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 40 degrees using a mild detergent Do not dry clean or bleach Tumble dry low and dry inside-out in shade Warm iron Celebrate the spirit of old Britain and the popular public joint - Stockton House - on your tee in style! Crafted from soft, premium cotton fabric to offer exemplary comfort, this T-shirt from facit celebrates the spirit of Old England where heads of bandits were put on display! This T-shirt looks great with jeans and sneakers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
